hero.label: Legal
hero.title: Cookie Policy
hero.sub: Politique de cookies. How this site uses cookies and similar technologies.

sections.heading: 1. What Are Cookies?
sections.body:
Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to site owners. Similar technologies include local storage, session storage, and tracking pixels.

In France, the deposit of non-essential cookies requires prior consent in accordance with the GDPR and the guidelines issued by the **CNIL**.

sections.heading: 2. Cookies We Use
sections.body:
**Strictly necessary · always active**

Essential for the website to function and to remember your cookie choices. These cannot be disabled and require no consent under applicable law.

**Analytics · privacy-friendly, no cookies**

We use **Vercel Web Analytics** (provided by Vercel Inc.) to understand how visitors use the site so we can measure and improve performance. It does **not** use cookies, does not store identifiers on your device, and does not track you across other websites. All data is aggregated and anonymised.

**Third-party embedded content · requires consent**

This site may embed content from third-party services (such as the GPODH podcast player or video). These services may set their own cookies when you interact with the embedded content, governed by their own policies, for example [Google's privacy policy](https://policies.google.com/privacy).

sections.heading: 3. Managing Cookies
sections.body:
This site sets no non-essential cookies of its own. Our analytics is cookieless (see above). The only cookies that may be set come from third-party embedded content, and only if you choose to interact with it. You can control or block cookies at any time through your browser settings:

- [Google Chrome](https://support.google.com/chrome/answer/95647)
- [Mozilla Firefox](https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/cookies-information-websites-store-on-your-computer)
- [Apple Safari](https://support.apple.com/en-gb/guide/safari/sfri11471/mac)
- [Microsoft Edge](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/delete-and-manage-cookies-168dab11-0753-043d-7c16-ede5947fc64d)

Please note that blocking certain cookies may affect the functionality of embedded content.

sections.heading: 4. Contact & Complaints
sections.body: For questions about our use of cookies, contact us via [our contact form](/contact). You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the [CNIL](https://www.cnil.fr).
